system.effect: The psyker unleashes a devastating psychic scream that tears at the minds of all nearby enemies. All creatures within range suffer 1d10 + Psy Rating Intelligence damage, ignoring armour and Toughness Bonus. Targets must pass a Willpower test or be Stunned for 1 round.

description.value: The psyker channels his psychic power into a devastating mental scream that assaults the minds of all creatures within range. Each target suffers 1d10 + Psy Rating Intelligence damage, ignoring armour and Toughness Bonus. Any target that suffers damage must pass a Willpower test or be Stunned for 1 round as their mind reels from the psychic assault.
